name: 13" Wall Clock Green/Chrome - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a classic look and function to your decor with the 13" Green and Chrome Wall Clock from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This analog wall clock is fabricated from glass, metal and plastic, and features a green trim around an off-white clock face that is easy to read. The timepiece will add timeless style to any indoor space, including your kitchen, hallway or nursery.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
